slogans: The comeback starts now. One point at a time.
You're never out of it until the last point.
Turn this around. You have the power.
Start the comeback. One game at a time.
This is where legends are made.
Rise from the ashes. Show your resilience.
The greatest comebacks start with belief.
You've done this before. Do it again.
Turn the tide. Momentum is building.
This is your comeback story. Write it now.
From behind to ahead. That's your style.
The comeback is real. Believe in it.
You're building momentum. Keep it going.
This is your moment to shine.
The comeback starts with this point.
